name: Gingered Flounder in Parchment
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, olive oil, garlic, and grated ginger in a bowl.
Marinate the fish for 10 minutes.
2. Cut four lengths of parchment paper or aluminum foil (each approximately 20 inches).
Fold each in half. Starting at the folded side, cut out half a heart shape.
Open the hearts on a flat surface. Spread one-fourth of the vegetables on one side
of each heart. Place a fish fillet on top of each; spoon any remaining marinade over the fillets.
Fold the paper over; seal by double pleating the edges all around. Place packets on a large baking sheet.
3. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
Carefully open one packet to test. If using foil packets, check the fish after 12 minutes.
Open the packets; serve.
